prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated F20C (from the Honda S2000 AP1) with a custom billet aluminum 87mm stroker crankshaft from Toda Racing, increasing displacement to 2.2L. Paired with Toda Racing Type-R spec connecting rods, JUN forged pistons (12.5:1 compression), and a custom 3-angle valve job with Supertech titanium retainers and dual valve springs. The engine is mated to a 6-speed manual transmission from a DC5 Integra Type R with a Quaife ATB helical LSD and a Spec Stage 3+ clutch.

Full bolt-on intake and exhaust system featuring a custom 4-1 equal-length stainless steel header by Hytech Exhaust, a 3-inch diameter titanium exhaust system with a Burns Merge Collector and a custom 304 stainless steel muffler by Fujitsubo. The intake system includes a custom carbon fiber velocity stack by ASM, a K&N RC-1060 air filter, and a custom aluminum intake plenum designed for optimal airflow distribution to the F20C throttle body.

Suspension overhaul with a full Ohlins Road & Track DFV kit (front and rear), adjustable camber plates by Buddy Club, and custom spherical bearing rear upper control arms by Progress Group. The car is lowered on Eibach ERS coilovers (custom valved for the BA4 chassis) with helper springs to prevent coil bind. Braking is upgraded to a full StopTech Big Brake Kit with 4-piston calipers, 328mm slotted rotors, and stainless steel braided lines, paired with Ferodo DS2500 pads.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Version 3 widebody kit (BA4-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front bumper canards, and a duckbill rear spoiler. The kit is paired with a custom carbon fiber hood by Seibon with a functional vent for the F20C intake system.

Custom 17x9.5 ET12 front and 17x10.5 ET5 rear wheels by Work Meister S1 3P in a gunmetal finish, wrapped in 235/40/17 and 265/35/17 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires. The wheels are fitted with custom titanium wheel spacers by 5Zigen for optimal fitment.

Full interior overhaul with a custom roll cage by AutoPower Industries (bolt-in, 6-point, chromoly), Recaro SRD-E seats with custom carbon fiber shells, and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub. The dashboard is replaced with a custom carbon fiber panel by Varis, featuring a digital gauge cluster by AIM MXS Strada with data logging for the F20C engine.
